description: Scans company press releases for fresh contract/order/supply wins, parses deal size, cross-references revenue to flag un-recognized forward revenue. Small-cap weighted (one contract is transformative). v2: full-market all sectors/caps, every 3h, graded deal-win signals.

schedule.description: Full-market deal-win scan every 3 hours (live rule cadence — catches PR dumps around the clock)
